body:
**GO:XXX; venom-mediated activation of inflammatory response**
Syn: Venom-mediated inflammation (BROAD)
A process by which an organism causes inflammatory response in another organism via the action of a venom. Venom-mediated inflammation is related to edema, leucocyte infiltration and release of inflammatory mediators such as cytokines.
PMID:32024243, PMID:19000915
**Gene product name and ID to be annotated to this term**
Many snake venom metalloproteinases (eg. A0A0K2JNB8, P85420 or P0DRN9)
**Parent term(s)**
GO:0035738; venom-mediated perturbation of biological process
**Children terms**
GO:0044398; venom-mediated edema



**GO:XXX; Venom-mediated leukocyte infiltration**
A process by which an organism causes leucocyte infiltration in another organism via the action of a venom.
PMID:32024243, PMID:26072684, PMID:19000915
**Gene product name and ID to be annotated to this term**
Many snake venom metalloproteinases (eg. A0A0K2JNB8, P85420, P0DRO0)
**Parent term(s)**
GO:XXX; Venom-mediated inflammatory response



**GO:XXX; Venom-mediated release of inflammatory mediator**
Syn: venom-mediated production of proinflammatory mediator
A process by which an organism causes release of inflammatory mediator in another organism via the action of a venom. Inflammatory mediator is possibly a cytokines or interleukins, for example.
PMID:32024243, 26072684
**Gene product name and ID to be annotated to this term**
Many snake venom metalloproteinases (eg. A0A0K2JNB8, P0DRO0)
**Parent term(s)**
GO:XXX; Venom-mediated inflammatory response



**GO:0044480; venom-mediated mast cell degranulation**
To add:
Part_of : GO:XXX; Venom-mediated inflammatory response

- venom-mediated activation of inflammatory response
- Synonym: venom-mediated inflammation (BROAD)
- Definition: A process by which an organism causes inflammatory response in another organism via the action of a venom. 
- References: PMID:32024243, PMID:19000915
- Subclass of: GO:0035738; venom-mediated perturbation of biological process

🤖 Working on it...

title: NTR: [venom-mediated inflammatory response+... leukocyte infiltration+... release of inflammatory mediator]
